suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a reminder: when creating a separate Vite build config with a different dev server port, workers must also update the dev-mode URL loading logic in src/main/main.ts to match the new port.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F008-CONFIG added vite.user-mgmt.config.ts on port 5174, but main.ts:196 still hardcodes localhost:5173 for the user-mgmt app in dev mode.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether backend-worker is expected to handle build-configuration tasks (Vite configs, package.json scripts). If not, add routing guidance so build-config features are assigned to an appropriate skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F008-CONFIG was assigned to backend-worker but only created a Vite config and updated package.json scripts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the agent-browser manual verification requirement: either make it mandatory with an explicit checklist for UI-heavy features, or relax it for backend-UI hybrid features while requiring alternative verification (e.g., component snapshot tests or preload integration tests).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F009-UI skipped agent-browser verification, leaving an unused conflict dialog and hardcoded 'skip' conflict strategy undetected.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on unit-testing sql.js database modules that use a module-private `db` variable. Document the recommended mocking strategy or suggest refactoring to accept an optional Database parameter for testability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F010-BE tests for userDatabase.ts could only assert return-object shape when db is uninitialized because the module-private db instance is difficult to mock in Jest.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md should add file path validation guidance.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented - AGENTS.md already states 'Validate file paths (prevent directory traversal)' under Security Guidelines.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the module-private db pattern in .factory/library/.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented - architecture.md already describes the sql.js database module pattern and testing limitations.
